sections.sectionTitle: Pasian in Thu a Manin A Khenna

verses.text: Pasian aw, nangma tungah ka lungdam mahmah uh a, nangma tungah ka nuam mahmah uh hi. Nangma liatna thu ka gen uh a, a lamdang na bawlnate ka sut kikkik uh hi
A hun ka sehsa ni ciangin thu a manin ka khen ding hi
Leitung leh a tunga tengte khempeuh a kilin' ciangin a khuampite a kipsakpa keimah ka hi hi
A kiphasakte tungah, “Kiphasak kei un,” a gilote tungah, “Kihisak kei un
Kihisak kei un la, kiphatsakna tawh kampau kei un,” ka ci hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh vangliatna pen nisuahna lam ahi a, nitumna lam ahi a, gamlak pan ahi zongin a hong pai hilo hi
Mihing khat a sangsak, mihing khat a niamsak thukhenpa pen Pasian ahi hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' khutsungah leenggahzu a phuan, a kihelkim ngiingei hai khat om a, amah in tua sung panin hong bungkhia ding a, leitung migilo khempeuh in a tawdat dong takin a liaktum ding uh hi
Ahih hangin kei ahih leh ka lungdam ngitnget ding a, Jakob Pasian' tungah phatna late ka sa ding hi
Migilote' vangliatna khempeuh amah in susia ding a, ahih hangin thuman mite' vangliatna khang semsem ding hi.
